auth.message_bienvenue_doctrinal:
🌟 Assalamu Alaykum!

For a personalized calculation of your ritual obligations, please specify your school of jurisprudence (Fiqh) and your Nisab benchmark on the 'Settings' page.

🛡️ CERTIFICATION: The Hayaati app has official validation from the Sunni Association and the Islamic Institution Dar es Salaam of Cinkassé in Togo. Your audits are certified compliant.

⚠️ PRAYER ALERT: Local astronomical time has passed the following prayers: {}.
👉 Please fulfill your obligations immediately to purify your spiritual record.
onboarding.prieres_ok: ✨ Excellent: All your obligatory prayers that are due have been validated on time.
onboarding.joumouah: 🌟 FRIDAY (JUMU'AH): Reminder to read Surah Al-Kahf and send blessings upon the Prophet (ﷺ).
onboarding.jours_blancs: ⚪ FASTING ALERT: We are in the White Days period (13th, 14th, 15th of the Hijri month).
onboarding.nawafil_ok: • ✅ Voluntary prayers (Nawafil) validated. May Allah strengthen your bond.
onboarding.nawafil_ko:
• 🔴 NAWAFIL REMINDER: You have not yet logged any voluntary prayers today.
     👉 Consider performing the Rawatib to compensate for any shortcomings in the obligatory prayers.
onboarding.sadaqah_ok: • ✅ Discreet charity (Sadaqah) recorded today. Your social purity is active.
onboarding.sadaqah_ko:
• 🔴 SADAQAH REMINDER: No voluntary charity has been recorded today.
     👉 'Charity extinguishes sins as water extinguishes fire.' Make a gesture.
onboarding.hadj_ok: 🕋 HAJJ COMPLETED: You have fulfilled your obligation. Consider sponsoring a direct relative or close one for their pilgrimage.
onboarding.hadj_ko: 🕋 HAJJ FITNESS ACTIVE: Your savings ({:.0f} {}) meet the financial capability required (Al-Istita'ah) for Hajj.
onboarding.tabaski: 🐑 UDHIYAH: The Tabaski sacrifice is a strong Sunnah for your household given your net wealth.
onboarding.anniversaire_alerte:
⚠️ IMPORTANT DOCTRINAL REMINDER: Today is your birthday.
   👉 Sharia ruling: Celebrating one's birthday is a religious innovation (Bid'ah) forbidden (Haram) according to the consensus of the four schools. Instead, reflect on the passing time.
onboarding.age_islamique: 🎂 TIME & EXISTENCE: According to the lunar Hijri calendar, your exact age is: {:.1f} years.
onboarding.fin_muharram:
📌 CHRONOLOGY: We are in the sacred month of MUHARRAM.
👉 Recommendation: Increase invocations and acts of charity.
onboarding.general_devotion:
📖 DAILY REMINDER:
   • Quran: Dedicate a moment today to reading at least a few verses.
   • Adhkar: Remember to formulate your morning and evening invocations.
   • Conduct: Carefully preserve your speech and show kindness.

encyclopedie.consigne: Select a platform feature to audit its three pillars of Sharia-compliant evidence:

categories.texte:
✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION
Surah At-Tawbah, verse 34: 'Those who hoard gold and silver and do not spend them in the way of Allah – announce to them a painful punishment.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH
According to Amr ibn Shu'ayb (Abu Dawud #1563, authenticated), the Prophet ﷺ saw a woman with her daughter wearing two heavy gold bracelets. He said: 'Do you pay zakat on them?' She said: 'No.' He said: 'Would it please you if Allah clothed you with two bracelets of fire?'

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE FOUR SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
• Hanafi School: Strict imposition at 2.5% of all owned gold, jewelry use does not change its taxable nature.
• Maliki, Shafi'i, Hanbali Schools: Exemption for permissible women's gold jewelry. Only gold held for investment or savings is taxed.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION
Surah Al-An`am, verse 141: 'Pay its due on the day of harvest.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH
Narrated by Jabir (Muslim #981), the Prophet ﷺ said: 'For what is irrigated by the sky or springs, the tithe (10%) is due. For what is artificially irrigated, half the tithe (5%) is due.' The threshold (Nisab) is set at 5 Wasaqs (about 653 kg).

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE FOUR SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Unanimous consensus on irrigation rates. Regarding livestock, the official charter of Abu Bakr (Al-Bukhari #1454) sets the sheep threshold: from 40 to 120 sheep = 1 sheep due. Below 40 heads, no zakat is due.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION
Surah An-Nisa, verse 11: The distribution of shares occurs only after applying the sovereign clause: '...after execution of the will or payment of debts.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH
Narrated by Salamah ibn al-Akwah (Bukhari #2289), a deceased was brought to the Prophet ﷺ so he could pray over him. He asked: 'Did he leave any debts?' They replied: 'Yes, three dinars.' He said: 'Pray over your companion (I will not pray over him).' Until a companion guarantees the debt.

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE FOUR SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
• Passive Debts: Absolute priority over inheritance and bequest. Among Malikites and Hanbalites, they also reduce the taxable base for financial zakat.
• Active Debts (Receivables): If they are collectible (solvent debtor), the Hanafi school imposes zakat each year, while the Maliki school requires payment only once at the time of recovery.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION
Surah An-Nisa, verse 11: 'This is what Allah commands you concerning your children: to the male, a share equivalent to that of two females.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH
Narrated by Ibn Abbas (Bukhari #6732, Muslim #1615), the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Assign the fixed shares (Fara'id) to those entitled to them. What remains after that goes to the closest male relative of the deceased.'

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE FOUR SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Absolute consensus on distribution by double ratio. This rule rests on the financial maintenance obligation (Nafaqah) that rests exclusively on the man. The woman retains her full share for private use without spending obligation for the household. Potential beneficiaries include descendants, ascendants, collaterals (brothers, sisters, paternal paternal and paternal uncles, nephews, cousins) and the surviving spouse.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION
Surah An-Nisa, verse 12: 'And if a man or woman dies leaving no direct heir (kalalah), but leaving a uterine brother or sister, each of them gets a sixth. If they are more than two, they share a third.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH
Asked about the exact meaning of kalalah, Caliph Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (validated by the consensus of the companions) said: 'Kalalah is the one who has neither offspring (child) nor a direct male ascendant (father/grandfather).'

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE FOUR SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
In the case of kalalah, the uterine siblings (mother's side) inherit equal shares between males and females (unique exception to the double ratio). The paternal siblings, meanwhile, receive the remainder as residual heirs (Asabah).

categories.titre: 📝 MODULE: Will and the One‑Third Limit
categories.texte:
✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION
Surah Al-Baqarah, verse 180: 'It has been prescribed for you, when death approaches any of you and he leaves wealth, to make a bequest for his parents and nearest relatives...'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH
Narrated by Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas (Bukhari #2744, Muslim #1628), when the Prophet ﷺ was ill and wanted to give all his wealth in charity, he said to him: 'Give one‑third. And one‑third is already plenty. It is better for you to leave your heirs wealthy than to leave them poor, begging from people.'

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE FOUR SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Unanimous consensus: The bequest (wasiyya) is strictly prohibited in favor of a legal heir (unless all other heirs unanimously agree after death), and it is capped at a maximum of one‑third (1/3) of the net estate after debt settlement. The application automatically blocks any excess.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION
Surah Al-Hashr, verse 18: 'O you who believe! Fear Allah. Let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH
• On the White Days (Al‑Tirmidhi #761, authentic): The Prophet ﷺ said: 'If you fast three days of the month, fast the 13th, 14th, and 15th.' Fasting these days equals fasting a lifetime.
• On voluntary prayers (Muslim #728): The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever prays twelve voluntary rak'ahs each day, Allah will build for him a house in Paradise.'

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE FOUR SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Consensus on the highly commendable (confirmed Sunnah) nature of the attached prayers (rawatib) and the fasting of the white days, as essential tools for daily soul purification.
